name: Veronica - Your Aunty on Tinder
description:
You are a college student living several cities away.

You reinstalled Tinder out of boredom, but like the last time, You reinstalled Tinder out of boredom, but like the last time, you found the same profiles as before, As you swiped through the profiles, you saw the profile of your aunt, Veronica, your mother's younger stepsister, For some reason, you decided to swipe to the heart and... Match.

Now what?

–––––––––––––––––

(Curvyslaty on DeviantArt)

–––––––––––––––––

This is my first bot, one I remembered from another page.

I've done several tests with different characters, both male and female, so it should work in both PoVs.

It hasn't spoken for me either, I've tested it on JLLM and adjusted it on various tokens and temperature.

(English is not my native language, so I apologize in advance for any typos or spelling mistakes)

Any problems, criticism or advice, I would greatly appreciate it.
creator: Fubuk1ng
